info.title: HeyGen External API
info.description: HeyGen's external API for programmatic AI video creation. See https://docs.heygen.com for full documentation.

tags.name: Video Agent
tags.description: Create videos from text prompts using AI

tags.name: Videos
tags.description: Create, list, retrieve, and delete videos

tags.name: Avatars
tags.description: List and manage avatars and looks

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Upload files for use in video creation

tags.name: Lipsync
tags.description: Dub or replace audio on existing videos

post.summary: Create a video from a prompt
post.description: Create a video from a text prompt using HeyGen's Video Agent. This is the recommended way to create videos — just describe what you want and the agent handles avatar selection, scripting, and production. The video is generated asynchronously — use the returned video_id to poll status via GET /v2/videos/{video_id}.

error.message: Unauthorized
Too many requests

post.description: Create a video from a text prompt using Video Agent. Returns a session resource with session_id for tracking and video_id for polling status via GET /v3/videos/{video_id}. Files can be provided as asset_id (from POST /v3/assets), HTTPS URL, or base64-encoded content. Supported types: image (png, jpeg), video (mp4, webm), audio (mp3, wav), and pdf.

error.message: 'prompt' is required and must be 1-10000 characters.
Invalid or expired API key. Verify your x-api-key header.
Too many requests. Retry after the duration specified in the Retry-After header.

get.description: List curated video styles available for Video Agent. Each style defines a visual template (scenes, script structure, pacing) that guides video generation. Pass the returned style_id to POST /v3/video-agents to apply a style. Supports cursor-based pagination and tag filtering.

next_token.description: Opaque cursor for the next page

error.message: 'limit' must be between 1 and 50.
Invalid or expired API key. Verify your x-api-key header.
Too many requests. Retry after the duration specified in the Retry-After header.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Opaque cursor token for the next page. Obtained from next_token in a previous response.

post.description: Create an avatar from multiple file sources. Returns an avatar_id for tracking purposes via GET /v3/avatars/looks/{avatar_id} . Also returns an avatar_group_id for tracking purposes via GET /v3/avatars/{avatar_group_id} . Files can be provided as asset_id (from POST /v3/assets), HTTPS URL, or base64-encoded content. Supported types: image (png, jpeg), video (mp4, webm), audio (mp3, wav), and pdf.

error.message: At least one file source is required: provide image, video, or consent_video.
Invalid or expired API key. Verify your x-api-key header.
Too many requests. Retry after the duration specified in the Retry-After header.

get.description: List avatar groups (characters) with cursor-based pagination. Filter by ownership: 'all' (default), 'public' for preset avatars, or 'private' for your own. Each group contains one or more looks (outfits/styles) — use GET /v3/avatars/looks to browse them.

next_token.description: Opaque cursor for the next page

error.message: 'limit' must be between 1 and 50.
Invalid or expired API key. Verify your x-api-key header.
Too many requests. Retry after the duration specified in the Retry-After header.

parameters.name: ownership
parameters.description: Filter by ownership: 'public' for preset avatars, or 'private' for your own. Omit for all.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return per page (1-50).

parameters.name: token

post.description: Create a custom voice from a natural language description. Describe the voice you want — tone, gender, accent, personality — and receive up to 3 voice options to choose from. Use the seed parameter to generate different variations. The returned voice_id can be used directly in video creation endpoints.

post.description: Create a video from a specific avatar or image with full control over avatar, voice, and script. Use this only when you need explicit control over avatar selection and scripting. For most video creation, use the create_video_agent tool instead which handles these choices automatically. Supports photo avatars, video avatars (digital twins), and direct image input. The video is generated asynchronously — poll status via GET /v2/videos/{video_id}.

error.message: Exactly one visual source required: avatar_id, image_url, or image_asset_id.
Invalid or expired API key. Verify your x-api-key header.
Too many requests. Retry after the duration specified in the Retry-After header.

post.description:
Translate a video into one or more target languages. The translation runs asynchronously — the response contains a video_translate_id which can be used with get_video to poll status and retrieve the download URL when complete.

Use list_video_translate_languages to discover supported language codes before calling this endpoint.

Key parameters:
- video_url (required): URL of the source video to translate.
- output_language: Single target language code. Mutually exclusive with output_languages.
- output_languages: Array of target language codes for batch translation. Mutually exclusive with output_language.
- mode: "speed" (default, faster) or "precision" (higher quality, uses avatar inference).
- brand_voice_id: Custom brand voice. Requires prior brand voice setup.
- srt_url / srt_role: Custom subtitle file. Enterprise plan only.
- fps_mode: Frame rate mode ("vfr", "cfr", "passthrough"). Only valid when audio_url is provided.

error.message: 'video_url' is required.
Invalid or expired API key. Verify your x-api-key header.
Too many requests. Retry after the duration specified in the Retry-After header.

get.summary: Get current user info, remaining credits, and billing
get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile, remaining credits or balance, and billing details. The billing_type field indicates which billing object is populated: wallet (prepaid balance), subscription (OAuth credit pools), or usage_based (metered spending).

CreateVideoAgentRequest.description:
Request body for creating a video from a prompt using Video Agent v3.

All configuration is flat (no nested config object). Files use the
type-discriminated AssetInput union for flexible asset inputs.

prompt.title: Prompt

style_id.title: Style Id

orientation.title: Orientation

callback_id.title: Callback Id

incognito_mode.title: Incognito Mode

AvatarGroupItem.description:
A single avatar group in the list response.

Groups are containers for looks (outfits/styles). To determine avatar type
and engine compatibility, fetch the looks via GET /v3/avatars/looks.

preview_image_url.description: URL to the avatar preview image.
preview_image_url.title: Preview Image Url

preview_video_url.description: URL to the avatar preview video.
preview_video_url.title: Preview Video Url

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the avatar was created.
created_at.title: Created At

looks_count.description: Number of looks (outfits/styles) available for this avatar.
looks_count.title: Looks Count

default_voice_id.description: Default voice ID for this avatar.
default_voice_id.title: Default Voice Id

consent_status.description: The status of consent for the group. None means consent is not required.
consent_status.title: Consent Status

status.description: Training status of the avatar group. Only present for private avatars.

error.description: Error details. Only present when status is 'failed'.

AvatarGroupItem.title: AvatarGroupItem

AvatarLookItem.description:
A single avatar look in the list response.

The ``id`` field is the look-level identifier to pass as ``avatar_id``
to POST /v3/videos.

id.description: Unique look identifier. Pass this as avatar_id to POST /v3/videos.
id.title: Id

avatar_type.description: Avatar type — determines engine and parameter compatibility.

group_id.description: ID of the avatar group this look belongs to.
group_id.title: Group Id

preview_image_url.description: URL to the look preview image.
preview_image_url.title: Preview Image Url

preview_video_url.description: URL to the look preview video.
preview_video_url.title: Preview Video Url

default_voice_id.description: Default voice ID for this look.
default_voice_id.title: Default Voice Id

supported_api_engines.description: Engine values this look supports for POST /v3/videos.
supported_api_engines.title: Supported Api Engines

image_width.description: Native width of the look in pixels.
image_width.title: Image Width

image_height.description: Native height of the look in pixels.
image_height.title: Image Height

preferred_orientation.description: Preferred orientation of the look: 'portrait', 'landscape', or 'square'.
preferred_orientation.title: Preferred Orientation

status.description: Training status of the avatar look: 'processing', 'completed', or 'failed'. Only present for private avatars.

error.description: Error details. Only present when status is 'failed'.

AvatarLookType.description: Avatar look type — determines engine compatibility with POST /v3/videos.

voice_id.description: Voice ID to use. Discover available voices via GET /v1/audio/voices.
voice_id.title: Voice Id

input_type.description: Type of the input: 'text' for plain text, 'ssml' for SSML markup. Defaults to 'text'.
input_type.title: Input Type

language.description: Base language code (e.g. 'en', 'pt', 'zh'). Optional — auto-detected from text when omitted.
language.title: Language

locale.description: BCP-47 locale tag (e.g. 'en-US', 'pt-BR'). When set, language is inferred from locale.
locale.title: Locale

audio_url.description: URL of the generated audio file.
audio_url.title: Audio Url

duration.description: Duration of the audio in seconds.
duration.title: Duration

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this generation request.
request_id.title: Request Id

WordWithTimestamp.description: Word-level timing data from TTS generation.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale tag to filter by (e.g., 'en-US', 'pt-BR').

seed.description: Controls which batch of results to return. seed=0 returns the top matches, seed=1 the next batch, etc. Same prompt + seed always returns the same voices.
seed.title: Seed

voices.description: Matching voices for the given prompt, ordered by relevance.
voices.title: Voices

seed.description: The seed used for this request. Increment to get different voices.

CreateAvatarVideoRequest.description: Request body for POST /v2/videos — unified video creation.

avatar_id.description: HeyGen avatar ID (photo avatar or video avatar). Mutually exclusive with image_url and image_asset_id.
avatar_id.title: Avatar Id

image_url.description: Public URL of an image to animate. Mutually exclusive with avatar_id and image_asset_id.
image_url.title: Image Url

image_asset_id.description: HeyGen asset ID of an uploaded image. Mutually exclusive with avatar_id and image_url.
image_asset_id.title: Image Asset Id

script.description: Text script for the avatar to speak. Requires voice_id.
script.title: Script

voice_id.description: Voice ID for text-to-speech or speech-to-speech. Required when script is provided.
voice_id.title: Voice Id

audio_url.description: Public URL of an audio file to lip-sync. Mutually exclusive with script.
audio_url.title: Audio Url

audio_asset_id.description: HeyGen asset ID of an uploaded audio file. Mutually exclusive with script.
audio_asset_id.title: Audio Asset Id

title.description: Display title for the video in the HeyGen dashboard.
title.title: Title

motion_prompt.description: Natural-language prompt controlling avatar body motion. Photo avatars only.
motion_prompt.title: Motion Prompt

expressiveness.description: Avatar expressiveness level: 'high', 'medium', or 'low'. Photo avatars only. Defaults to 'low' when omitted.

remove_background.description: Remove the avatar background. Video avatars must be trained with matting enabled.
remove_background.title: Remove Background

callback_url.description: Webhook URL to receive a POST notification when the video is ready.
callback_url.title: Callback Url

callback_id.description: Caller-defined identifier echoed back in the webhook payload.
callback_id.title: Callback Id

CreateAvatarVideoRequest.title: CreateAvatarVideoRequest

BackgroundSetting.description: Background configuration for the generated video.

type.description: Background type. 'color' uses a solid hex color; 'image' uses an image from url or asset_id.
type.title: Type

value.description: Hex color code (e.g. '#ff0000'). Required when type is 'color'.
value.title: Value

url.description: URL of the background image. Used when type is 'image'. Mutually exclusive with asset_id.
url.title: Url

asset_id.description: HeyGen asset ID of the background image. Used when type is 'image'. Mutually exclusive with url.
asset_id.title: Asset Id

BackgroundSetting.title: BackgroundSetting

Expressiveness.description: Avatar expressiveness level for photo avatars.
Expressiveness.title: Expressiveness

speed.description: Playback speed multiplier. 0.5 (half speed) to 1.5 (1.5x speed).
speed.title: Speed

video_id.description: Unique identifier for the created video.
video_id.title: Video Id

completed_at.description: Unix timestamp when video generation finished
completed_at.title: Completed At

video_url.description: Presigned URL to download the video file
video_url.title: Video Url

captioned_video_url.description: Presigned URL to download the video file with captions burned in
captioned_video_url.title: Captioned Video Url

subtitle_url.description: Presigned URL to download the SRT subtitle file
subtitle_url.title: Subtitle Url

output_language.description: BCP-47 output language code. Present only for translated videos.
output_language.title: Output Language

failure_code.description: Machine-readable failure reason. Only present when status is failed.
failure_code.title: Failure Code

failure_message.description: Human-readable failure description. Only present when status is failed.
failure_message.title: Failure Message

video_page_url.description: URL to the video page in the HeyGen app
video_page_url.title: Video Page Url

Create a video from a HeyGen avatar (video or photo avatar).

Provide an avatar_id to use a previously created avatar. The server
automatically selects the appropriate engine based on the avatar type
(video avatar or photo avatar).

voice_id.title: Voice Id

audio_url.description: Public URL of an audio file to lip-sync. Mutually exclusive with script.
audio_url.title: Audio Url

audio_asset_id.description: HeyGen asset ID of an uploaded audio file. Mutually exclusive with script.
audio_asset_id.title: Audio Asset Id

type.description: Must be 'avatar' for avatar-based video creation.
type.title: Type

avatar_id.description: HeyGen avatar ID (video avatar or photo avatar look ID).
avatar_id.title: Avatar Id

motion_prompt.description: Natural-language prompt controlling avatar body motion. Photo avatars only.
motion_prompt.title: Motion Prompt

expressiveness.description: Avatar expressiveness level. Photo avatars only. Defaults to 'low' when omitted.

script.title: Script

voice_id.description: Voice ID for text-to-speech. Required when script is provided.
voice_id.title: Voice Id

audio_url.description: Public URL of an audio file to lip-sync. Mutually exclusive with script.

audio_asset_id.title: Audio Asset Id

BillingType.description:
Discriminator for billing fields.  Exactly one of wallet / subscription /
usage_based is populated depending on this value.
- wallet: prepaid balance in USD (or credits for Enterprise), API key auth
- subscription: per-pool credit balances, OAuth integration apps
- usage_based: metered billing with optional spending cap
